basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 64 Years of age as on opening date for receipt of applications.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 Years as on opening date for receipt of applications. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma or Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering OR Masters' Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering.
qualification.details: Officers working under the Central Government/ State Government/ Union Territory Administrations: Analogous post as Junior Engineer or equivalent in their parent cadre/department. Officers with at least 5 years of regular service in Level-5 in engineering cadre (Rs. 25500-81100) (PB-1, Rs. 5200-20200+ GP 2800/-). Diploma in Civil Engineering from any recognized University or Institute. Diploma in Electrical Engineering from any recognized University or Institute. Degree in Civil Engineering from any recognized University or Institute/AICTE. Degree in Electrical Engineering from any recognized University or Institute/AICTE. Masters' Degree in Civil Engineering from recognized University Institute/ AICTE. Masters' Degree in Electrical Engineering from any recognized University or Institute/AICTE. Minimum one year experience in the various aspects of maintenance & constructions of civil infrastructure preferably sports infrastructure works OR Minimum one year experience in the various aspects of electrical works preferably with electrical works in sports infrastructure.

salary_details.details: Remuneration: A fixed monthly amount shall be admissible, arrived at by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement. The basic pension to be deducted from the Last pay drawn shall be pension as fixed at the time of retirement and, as such, if the employee has availed of the commuted value of pension, the commuted portion of pension shall also be included in the portion of pension to be deducted. The amount of remuneration so fixed shall remain unchanged for the term of the contract. No annual increment/percentage increase and Dearness Allowance shall be allowed during the term of the contract. Transport Allowance: You will be entitled for the transport allowance of Rs. 10,800/- per month during the period of contract. The amount so fixed shall remain unchanged during the term of appointment.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Sports Authority of India Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sports Authority of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sports Authority of India Junior Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Sports Authority of India Junior Engineer recruitment is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Diploma or Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering with specific service experience, or a Master's Degree in Civil/Electrical Engineering with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer position?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 64 years as on the opening date for receipt of applications.

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Engineer post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Junior Engineer role?
faq.answer: The salary is determined by deducting the pension from the last drawn pay, plus a transport allowance of Rs. 10,800/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Sports Authority of India Junior Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply only through the online mode via the official website.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Engineer post in the Sports Authority of India recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job for the Junior Engineer post?
faq.answer: The Junior Engineer position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will provide a direct link to the PDF.
